title: [Nyessem, Orb Approach]
description: The walls here are colored a dark, matte black.  A pale silver spotlight emitting its beam straight from the ceiling focuses on a glittering gem-studded arch.  Flanking the arch on all sides are some dark crimson banners trimmed with bright violet threads.  Above the top banner running perpendicular to the arch is a gem-cut crest for the Maivaldius family.  At the crest's center is a large rune-etched diamond.  Opposite the arch are some wide stairs.
